title: Review for Backward Compatibility
description: Check whether a change breaks existing callers or data.
content:
Assess whether this change is backward compatible:

```
{{diff}}
```

Identify any break to: public function signatures, serialized data formats, config keys, API responses, or behavior existing callers depend on. For each break, propose either a non-breaking alternative or a migration path (deprecation window, version gate, data migration). State clearly whether this can ship without a major version bump.
